summary: Addiction Loop Metrics Dashboard Testing Complete - All features verified working. Backend: GET /api/growth/loop-dashboard returns all 7 sections (health, funnel, dropoffs, top_stories, hooks, categories, live_feed). POST /api/growth/events/batch accepts all loop events. Frontend: GrowthDashboard.js renders at /app/admin/growth with all 7 sections, period selector (7d/14d/30d), and refresh button. Dashboard.js tracks impression+click events. PublicCreation.js tracks watch_start, watch_complete, continue, share events. StoryPreview.js tracks continue event.
critical_code_review_comments: growth_analytics.py VALID_EVENTS (lines 40-48) correctly includes all loop events: impression, click, watch_start, watch_complete, continue, share, signup_from_share
growth_analytics.py loop-dashboard endpoint (lines 334-531) returns all 7 sections with correct structure
growth_analytics.py batch events endpoint (lines 99-139) accepts up to 50 events with deduplication
GrowthDashboard.js (lines 24-46) HealthBar component shows Continue Rate, Share Rate, K-Factor with color-coded benchmarks
GrowthDashboard.js (lines 48-88) Funnel component shows 6 stages with conversion rates
GrowthDashboard.js (lines 90-114) DropoffAnalysis component highlights worst drop-off with warning icon
GrowthDashboard.js (lines 271-284) Period selector buttons (7d, 14d, 30d) with data-testid attributes
Dashboard.js StoryCard (lines 254-266) tracks impression via IntersectionObserver with threshold 0.5
Dashboard.js StoryCard handleClick (lines 268-283) tracks click event with story metadata
PublicCreation.js (line 380) tracks watch_start on video play
PublicCreation.js (line 115) tracks watch_complete on video end
PublicCreation.js (line 159) tracks continue event with hook_variant
PublicCreation.js (line 187) tracks share event with platform info
StoryPreview.js (line 55) tracks continue event with story metadata
growthTracker.js (lines 33-48) implements batched event queue with 3s flush or 10 events threshold
seed_data_creation: Test events seeded via batch endpoint for stories test-s1, test-s2 with hook variants and categories
context_for_next_testing_agent: Addiction Loop Metrics Dashboard fully verified. All 7 sections render correctly: Health Bar (Continue Rate 80% STRONG, Share Rate 80% VIRAL, K-Factor 2 VIRAL), Funnel (22 impressions → 6 clicks → 5 watch_starts → 5 watch_completes → 4 continues → 4 shares), Drop-off Analysis (worst: Watch Complete → Continue 20%), Top Stories, Hook A/B, Categories, Live Feed. Period selector (7d/14d/30d) works. Event tracking implemented in Dashboard.js (impression, click), PublicCreation.js (watch_start, watch_complete, continue, share), StoryPreview.js (continue).

backend_loop_dashboard_endpoint.details: GET /api/growth/loop-dashboard returns all 7 sections with correct structure

backend_batch_events_endpoint.details: POST /api/growth/events/batch accepts all loop event types (impression, click, watch_start, watch_complete, continue, share, signup_from_share)

backend_metrics_computation.details: click_rate, completion_rate, continue_rate, share_rate, k_factor computed correctly

frontend_growth_dashboard.details: GrowthDashboard.js renders at /app/admin/growth with all 7 sections

frontend_health_bar.details: Shows Continue Rate, Share Rate, K-Factor with color-coded benchmarks (strong/viral/weak)

frontend_funnel.details: Shows 6 stages with conversion rates between stages

frontend_dropoff.details: Highlights worst drop-off with warning icon

frontend_dashboard_tracking.details: Dashboard.js tracks impression (IntersectionObserver) and click events via growthTracker

frontend_public_creation_tracking.details: PublicCreation.js tracks watch_start, watch_complete, continue, share events

growth_events_collection.details: Accepts all new event types (impression, click, watch_start, watch_complete, continue, share, signup_from_share)
